items.caption: A comprehensive guide to chemical hazard symbols, each accompanied by a brief description of the associated chemical hazard. the symbols are arranged in a grid format, with each one representing a different type of hazard. the symbols are universally recognized and are used to warn of various chemical dangers. the descriptions provide a quick reference for understanding the potential risks associated with each symbol. the image serves as an educational tool for those working with chemicals, emphasizing the importance of safety and awareness in the laboratory setting.
